title: cacalia plantaginea
intro: Cacalia plantaginea, also known as Wood's Cress, is a perennial plant species within the family Asteraceae, native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cacalia plantaginea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often made into teas or infusions, while the roots are used in tinctures and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
